text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Fan Fest—a huge sporting
event wherein Tracen Academy opens its doors to
fans of all ages.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Races are important, but the Fan Fest is a big
deal too! We've gotta make the most of the
celebrations and have lots of fun. ☆
choice_data_list: What contest are you going to compete in?
What contest are you going to compete in?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Well, the sport that's most compatible with
feng shui would be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using this logic, Copano Rickey ends up
choosing...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Cheer squad! I'll lead my team
to victory with feng shui cheers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she'll be on a cheer team instead of one
of the sports teams. And it looks like she won't be
doing it alone.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let me guess—you could use a hand?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Very well, Rickey. If you're serious about this, I
shall demonstrate the mindset of a first-rate
cheerleader for you.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry, Nature, King. Feng shui cheering isn't
really like that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's less about cheering and more about taking
control of the space around you.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So these two are gonna be helping me out!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um... What are we supposed to do?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: A cheer squad? Now that's marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the left is Manhattan Cafe. She's a mysterious
Umamusume who's rumored to be haunted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the right is Marvelous Sunday. She adores
anything marvelous, and is on a mission to inject
that energy into every aspect of her life.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep. With me in the lead and these two in
just the right positions...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There's no contest we can't win! Can I count on
you two to go where I tell you?

text_block_list.name: Cafe and Marvelous
text_block_list.text:
...Okay.
Sure! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The soccer game begins before long, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, first is Xun. I'll position Manhattan Cafe
behind the home goal, facing southeast.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The players on the other team... are coming this
way? If they score a goal...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...That's not happening. Not ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: OOOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Opposition Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the heck is that?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Next up is Qian. I'll position Marvelous Sunday to
the side of the opposition's goal, facing
northwest.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Fweep, fweep, fweep! ☆ Fweep, fweep, fweep! ♪ I'm in a marvelous mood! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Shoot, shoot, marvelous! Goal after goal!
Marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Home-Team Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I have a feeling we're gonna get one in!
When we get the chance, we've gotta blast the
ball!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yin and yang... When two poles are created on a
field, qi flows between them. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Both advantageous and disadvantageous flows
are born. This is the key to the home field
advantage. Now, we just wait.

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: Fweeep! That's the end of the match!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Did we win?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆ Marvelous! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scores are close, but there was a drastic
difference in the percentage of ball possession
and the number of shots taken by each team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is undoubtedly the work of Copano Rickey's
feng shui power. However...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm really glad they won! Okay, how about
we head somewhere else now?
choice_data_list: You're not going to the winner's circle?
You're not going to the winner's circle?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. People wouldn't have been able to
tell that we even did anything to help.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui cheering is done in the shadows. And
that's good enough for us. Right?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... You might be right about that.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not sure I get it, but they were definitely a
very cool cheer group.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Now, to close out the Fan Fest, I think I'm gonna
compete in an event myself.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I do wanna use some of my feng shui to win and
get at least a little attention, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's about the only event left anyway.
Okay, here I go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In sky-high spirits, Copano Rickey leaps into the
pool.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
W-wait... I just remembered that when I was
little...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I had this dream where I was drowning... Ah, my
leg's cramping... Owww...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Distracted by her memories of the past, things
quickly go south for Copano Rickey, and she
places poorly in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the Fan Fest wrap-up party, Copano
Rickey finds out that her contributions may not
have gone as unheeded as she'd thought.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a sec! Why are there so many people
here?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Rickey! Lend me some of your feng shui power!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And I need some feng shui fortune telling! ...Wait,
is feng shui even about fortune telling?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Copano Rickey has a reputation as
the feng shui Umamusume. She's being mobbed
by so many fans that she can hardly move.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What do I do? There's so many of them, and only
one of me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There has to be some way I can reach all of
them...
choice_data_list:
What if you try to make them all happy at
once?

What if you try to make them all happy at
once?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Make them all happy at once?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey falls into deep thought. And
then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh! I know! There's this one thing I can only do because there are so many people here. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Listen up, everyone! Let's all make a formation!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
A happy formation that's gonna bring everyone
good fortune! ☆ I'll go to the roof and tell you all
what to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Copano Rickey rushes up to the
rooftop.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone in the kun position! A bit more to
the right! A bit more...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's good! Now the eight trigrams
formation is complete! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a round of applause. Together, they've
made a picture of happiness that no one person
could draw alone.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Now happiness should be in reach for
everyone. ☆ So, next up!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Fan Fest wrap-up party! Rickey! ☆
Lucky! ☆ Super happy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom! Boom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the fireworks echoes as the Fan Fest
comes to a joyous end.
